dag-engine.guard: test -f packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/engine/dag-engine.ts && grep -q 'dispatchReady' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/engine/dag-engine.ts && grep -q 'cycle' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/engine/dag-engine.ts && npx --yes nx test agent-mcp 2>&1 | grep -qE 'passed'
dag-engine.notes: PREREQUISITE: task-schema-foundation plan must be deployed first. depends_on/on_upstream_failure/inputs columns exist in schema.ts; 'waiting'/'awaiting_input' in taskStatusSchema; TaskStore.create() accepts dependsOn/onUpstreamFailure. This node also owns validation/execution.ts (adds inputs?: Record<string,string> to ExecutionContext — upstream task results injected at dispatch time).

audit-foundation.notes: Checks dag-engine.1-7 (DagEngine existence, dispatchReady, cycle detection, wiring, tests) plus dag-engine.8 (execution.ts inputs field).

code-review.notes: Human hold point. Reviewer checks DagEngine, dispatch wiring, execution.ts inputs, tests.

audit-final.notes: Runs all checks plus full build, test suite, and DoD coverage.

docs-and-publish.notes: Bump agent-mcp to 1.0.0. agent-mcp-types was already bumped by task-schema-foundation (TaskStatus gains 'waiting'/'awaiting_input'). Document depends_on, on_upstream_failure, inputs in CLAUDE.md and README.
